# Thermal Experiment

**Summary**: Controlled heating of organisms to determine the temperature at which they become immobile or die.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] conducted thermal experiments to determine upper limits for gastropods and ostracods.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Ostracods showed an initial lethal effect starting around 47.2°C with a ULT of 53.5°C. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 48]])
